request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people support alliances, but have we really thought about the costs? Our tax dollars are going to maintain bases overseas while our own infrastructure crumbles. Remember when the local hospital closed because funds were diverted to 'alliance obligations'? We need to put America first and demand our partners contribute fairly. #NationalSecurity #AllianceFairness
